title: snappy umami argentinian lentils pilaf
description: a hearty and flavorful argentinian-inspired dish featuring snappy lentils and a rich umami flavor profile.

ingredients.name: green or brown lentils
ingredients.notes: any variety of lentil works, but green or brown hold their shape best during cooking.

ingredients.name: onion
ingredients.instructions: heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the diced onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until it starts to caramelize and develop a deep brown color, about 8 minutes.
ingredients.description: a hearty and flavorful argentinian-inspired dish featuring snappy lentils and a rich umami flavor profile.
ingredients.title: snappy umami argentinian lentils pilaf

ingredients.name: green or brown lentils
ingredients.notes: any variety of lentil works, but green or brown hold their shape best during cooking.

ingredients.name: smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: this ingredient contributes to the dish's umami flavor profile

instructions: cook the lentils according to package instructions until they reach a texture your bite.
heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the diced onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until it starts to caramelize and develop a deep brown color, about 8 minutes.
add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
add the smoked paprika, cumin, chili powder, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
add the cooked lentils to the skillet and stir to combine with the spice mixture.
cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the lentils are heated through and the flavors have melded together.
